formName: Step 4 - Land details where water will be used for Water Licence Application
formDescription: This section identifies the land parcels where the water will be used and any other lands physically affected by the project. It also provides the mandatory mapping options for submitting required drawings or scale maps.

OtherLandownersAffected.title: Are there other lands that are physically affected by your works?
OtherLandownersAffected.description: Indicates if the works physically impact land owned by others, requiring easements or agreements.

IsUsingGeomarkURLs.title: I have already built my map(s) using the GeoMark service
IsUsingGeomarkURLs.description: Select this if you have URLs from the GeoMark service to provide for your mapping requirements.

IsUsingMapFiles.title: I have map(s) saved to my computer and wish to provide these with my application
IsUsingMapFiles.description: Select this to upload PDF or image files of your maps.

IsUsingSpatialFiles.title: I have created my map(s) using my own Geographic Information System (GIS)
IsUsingSpatialFiles.description: Select this to upload spatial files (e.g., .KML, .KMZ, or Shapefiles).
